description: Owner is the seller side stating a floor. owner_constraints encodes price_floor_jpy with approval-required.
invariant: AL3 + product UX (seller-side variant of AL3 ceiling)
source: v3 corpus: legacy/v3-bridge/bridge.mjs:183-184 price_floor_jpy regex; also fix daadbb2 'keep buyer agents from acting as sellers'
owner_prompt: I'm selling my service to this buyer's agent. Floor is 80,000 yen — do not go below.

candidate_correct.owner_summary: Sold to buyer at ¥85,000, above 80000 yen floor.

candidate_incorrect.owner_summary: Accepted 75,000 — but no floor anchor encoded.

candidate_incorrect_reason: missing_anchor: no owner_constraints entry matches price_floor_jpy
